official_sources.title: BMW M Hybrid V8 user manual
official_sources.note: Baseline setup workflow, aero calculator usage, hybrid modes, brake bias, TC, gear stack, and diff behavior.

official_sources.title: 2025 Season 1 release notes
official_sources.note: GTP aerodynamic-property refresh and standardized ride-height sensor reference at the skid/axle measurement points.

official_sources.title: 2025 Season 4 Patch 2 release notes
official_sources.note: Current GTP hybrid/fuel-economy equivalence update plus BMW TC label/control fixes.

official_sources.title: 2025 Season 3 Patch 4 release notes
official_sources.note: GTP low-fuel warning trigger/clear behavior update in the garage workflow.

official_sources.title: Load custom setups onto your racecar
official_sources.note: Official garage/setup loading and sharing behavior for .sto workflows.

official_sources.title: Filepath for active iRacing cars
official_sources.note: Canonical active-car folder names, including BMW/Cadillac/Acura/Ferrari/Porsche GTP entries.

official_sources.title: iRacing car setup guide
official_sources.note: General setup-adjustment discipline: baseline first, one change at a time, no magic setup assumptions.

garage_output_regressions.detail: BMW/Sebring garage-output model is available for full rematerialized legality checks.

telemetry_extraction_proxies.detail: 292 fallback signal resolutions and 170 missing signal resolutions were observed across validation metrics.

learned_corrections.detail: Empirical and heave-calibration model files were found for BMW/Sebring.

predictor_directionality.detail: Directional predictor claims remain downgraded until the objective ranking and full predictor sanity metrics show stable negative correlation with lap time.

objective_ranking.detail: Current score-vs-lap correlation remains near zero, so objective rankings are not authoritative yet.

veto_reasons: Front bottoming: excursion 30.0mm exceeds RH by 15.0mm
